title: Add Product Variants Support

requirements.text: Extend the backend Product data type to support variants (e.g., size, concentration, bottle type) as a list of variant options, each with a name, value, optional price adjustment, and optional stock quantity. Store variants as part of the product record.
acceptanceCriteria: Product records can store zero or more variants.
Each variant has: name (e.g. 'Size'), value (e.g. '50ml'), priceAdjustment (optional, positive or negative), and stock (optional Nat).
Existing products without variants are unaffected.

requirements.text: Add backend functions to create, update, and delete variants on a product. Only the product owner (vendor) or an admin may modify variants.
acceptanceCriteria: addProductVariant(productId, variant) adds a variant to a product.
updateProductVariant(productId, variantIndex, variant) updates an existing variant.
removeProductVariant(productId, variantIndex) removes a variant.
Calls from non-owners and non-admins return an error.

requirements.text: Update the ProductForm component in the vendor dashboard to allow vendors to add, edit, and remove product variants inline. Each variant row should have fields for name, value, price adjustment (optional), and stock (optional).
acceptanceCriteria: Vendors can add a new variant row with name, value, price adjustment, and stock fields.
Vendors can remove any variant row.
On product save, variants are persisted via the backend mutation.
Existing products with no variants render a clean empty variants section.

requirements.text: Update the ProductCard and product detail UI to display available variants as selectable options (e.g., a dropdown or button group). When a variant is selected, show the adjusted price and variant-specific stock availability.
acceptanceCriteria: Products with variants show a variant selector on the product card or detail view.
Selecting a variant updates the displayed price with any price adjustment applied.
Add-to-cart includes the selected variant information.
Products with no variants render normally with no selector shown.

requirements.text: Update the TypeScript types in frontend/src/types/index.ts to include a ProductVariant type (name, value, priceAdjustment, stock) and extend the Product type to include an optional variants array.
acceptanceCriteria: ProductVariant type is defined with correct fields.
Product type includes variants: ProductVariant[] field.
All existing type usages remain compatible.

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks in useQueries.ts for addProductVariant, updateProductVariant, and removeProductVariant mutations, and ensure product queries re-fetch after any variant mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: useAddProductVariant, useUpdateProductVariant, useRemoveProductVariant mutation hooks are available.
On success, the relevant product query cache is invalidated so the UI reflects changes immediately.

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture).
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Implement only product variants in this step — do not implement bundles or wholesaling yet.
nonGoals: Product bundles (deferred to a subsequent build step).
Wholesaling / wholesale pricing tiers (deferred to a subsequent build step).
Transfer of ownership feature (deferred — previous build attempt failed, to be retried separately).
Changes to cart, order, or checkout logic beyond passing variant info through add-to-cart.
